hot_content_events.headline: Google uses goats to cut grass!

conversation.content: Hey there! I heard Google uses goats to eat grass instead of mowing. How cool is that? What do you think?

Oh, um, I think... it's very interesting! Goats eat grass? Like, um, they are animals, right? I not see goats before. I think it is cool because, uh, no machine noise? And, um, goats maybe very cute. 

But, um, I not sure if they work hard. Do they eat a lot? What you think about goats?

Oh, I love how you think about goats! They do eat a lot of grass, and it's a fun and eco-friendly way to handle lawns. I also think they must be quite hardworking, munching away all day! Goats are indeed very cute. What do you think it would be like to see goats in action?

Um, I think... to see goats in action, it must be fun! They, um, run and jump, yes? I like when they, uh, play with each other. Maybe they make sounds, like "baa baa"? I feel happy to see cute animals. But, um, I not know how they work hard. Do they eat a lot?

Seeing goats in action would definitely be fun! They do run, jump, and play a lot, and their "baa baa" sounds are quite cute. Goats eat a lot of grass, which is why they can be so helpful. Imagine playing in a field with them, surrounded by their playful energy! What kind of cute animals make you feel happy?

Um, I think... cute animals, um, make me happy! I like puppies and kittens. They very small and, um, they play a lot too. Puppies, they, um, run fast and, um, they like to bite my shoes. Hehe. Kittens, they, um, sleep a lot and they are soft. I like when they purr. 

Um, also rabbits! They are fluffy and jump, yes? I want to see all cute animals together, like, um, in a big park! That would be so fun! What about you? What animals make you happy?

Oh, imagining all those cute animals together in a big park sounds like a dream! I think puppies and kittens are adorable too, especially when they play and purr. For me, dolphins make me happy. I love how they jump and play in the water. Have you ever seen dolphins? What do you think it would be like to see them up close?

Um, I... I think dolphins are very, um, beautiful! They jump in water and, um, do tricks, yes? I never see dolphins in real life, but, um, I see them on TV. They look so happy and, um, play a lot. I think it must be... um, exciting to see them close! Maybe, um, I can go to ocean and see dolphins one day. Do you, um, like to see dolphins?

Oh, dolphins really are beautiful and full of energy! I do like seeing dolphins. Their playful nature is amazing, and watching them jump and do tricks is always exciting. Going to the ocean to see them sounds like a fantastic plan! What do you think it would feel like to be near dolphins in the ocean?

Um, I think... it feel very, um, exciting! Maybe, um, a little scary too? Because, um, ocean is big and, um, water is deep. But dolphins, they look friendly, yes? I want to, um, swim with them and, um, play games! I think it will be fun. I hope they, um, like me too. Do you think dolphins, um, like people?

I totally get that feeling of excitement and a bit of fear about the ocean. Dolphins do seem very friendly, and they are known to enjoy playing with people! I believe they can sense when someone is kind and playful, just like you. What games would you like to play with dolphins if you could?
